characters.title: Eldrin Frostward
characters.description: An elven archmage who has lived for over 800 years. Specializes in cold and time magic.
characters.personality: Cold, distant, but deeply protective of his apprentices.
characters.appearance: Tall and gaunt, with silver hair that seems to give off mist.
characters.secret_motive: Searching for the lost relic of his fallen kingdom

characters.title: Mira Quickstep
characters.description: A halfling thief with a heart of gold and pockets to match.
